games.title: Grand Theft Auto VI
games.description: The most anticipated game of the decade finally arrives. Return to Vice City and the surrounding state of Leonida in this massive open-world crime epic that pushes gaming technology to new heights. Play as Lucia and Jason in a modern-day Bonnie and Clyde narrative across a sprawling, hyper-detailed world. Every neighborhood has its own culture and rhythm. Dynamic world events, reactive AI, and an evolving ecosystem make Leonida feel alive. Improved combat mechanics include refined gunplay, deep hand-to-hand systems, and expanded vehicle combat. The online component launches with a全新的 shared-world experience featuring heists, businesses, and community events. Rockstar's signature storytelling, cutting-edge graphics, and infinite emergent gameplay redefine what video games can achieve. With ray-tracing, physics-driven destruction, and a soundtrack spanning decades of hits, GTA VI sets a new benchmark for interactive entertainment.

games.title: Ghost of Yotei
games.description: Set 300 years after the events of Ghost of Tsushima, a new Ghost rises in the shadow of Mount Yotei in feudal Japan's northern frontier. Play as Atsu, a warrior haunted by her past, armed with a new arsenal of weapons including dual katanas, chain sickles, and explosive powder bombs. The vast Ezo region features snow-capped mountains, dense forests, sprawling plains, and coastal villages, each with distinct weather and seasonal cycles that dynamically affect gameplay. Deep snow muffles footsteps but leaves tracks, rain extinguishes your bow, and fog limits visibility. New Ghost weapons expand tactical options: smoke bombs for escapes, wind chimes for distractions, and sticky bombs for traps. The stand-off system returns with new multi-enemy chain assassinations. A gripping story of vengeance, redemption, and identity unfolds against stunning landscapes rendered with Sucker Punch's signature visual artistry. Wind guides you to objectives, fireflies mark points of interest, and wildlife reacts to your presence.

games.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
games.description: Rockstar's magnum opus is a peerless open-world Western that sets a new benchmark for immersion and storytelling. You play as Arthur Morgan, an outlaw grappling with his morality as the Wild West fades into modernity. The world is alive in ways no game has matched — animals have their own ecosystems, NPCs follow daily routines, and the weather shapes gameplay naturally. The camp system creates genuine emotional bonds with your gang members, making every loss hit hard. The Honor system subtly shifts dialogue, missions, and even the ending based on your actions. From the snow-capped mountains of Ambarino to the humid swamps of Lemoyne, every inch of this world tells a story. It is a patient, detail-obsessed masterpiece.

games.title: Grand Theft Auto V
games.description: More than a decade after release, GTA V remains a technical marvel and a cultural touchstone. Los Santos is one of the most detailed and believable open worlds ever created, a satirical take on Los Angeles that feels alive with activity. The three-protagonist structure lets you switch between Michael, Franklin, and Trevor on the fly, experiencing heists and missions from multiple perspectives. The writing is sharp and hilarious, skewering modern American culture with surgical precision. GTA Online has evolved into a massive persistent world with heists, businesses, races, and constant content updates. The modding community keeps the single-player experience fresh with everything from graphics overhauls to total conversions. It's a game that refuses to age.

games.title: Ghost of Tsushima
games.description: Sucker Punch's love letter to samurai cinema is a stunning open-world action game set during the first Mongol invasion of Japan. You play as Jin Sakai, a samurai who must abandon his noble code to defend his homeland using unconventional tactics. The world of Tsushima is breathtaking — fields of pampas grass sway in the wind, cherry blossoms drift through the air, and the guiding wind mechanic replaces cluttered waypoints with elegant navigation. Combat is precise and lethal, with standoffs that capture the tension of a samurai duel. The Kurosawa Mode filters the entire game into black and white, complete with film grain, as a tribute to classic cinema. The Iki Island expansion deepens Jin's backstory with emotional weight.

games.title: Resident Evil 4 Remake
games.description: Capcom's greatest survival horror game is reborn with modern gameplay while preserving everything that made the original legendary. The over-the-shoulder shooting is tighter than ever, with knife parries adding new defensive options. The Spanish village setting is expanded with more areas to explore and secrets to uncover. The story of Leon Kennedy's rescue mission is presented with new gravitas, with improved voice acting and deeper character moments. The Merchant returns with more upgrades, and the attaché case inventory management is as satisfying as ever. The Separate Ways DLC adds Ada Wong's perspective with unique missions. It honors the original while confidently standing on its own.

games.title: Resident Evil 2 Remake
games.description: The survival horror classic returns with a stunning remake. Play as Leon Kennedy and Claire Redfield in Raccoon City as a deadly virus transforms the population into ravenous zombies. Explore the iconic police station, solve intricate puzzles, and face the relentless Tyrant in this masterful reimagining. With over-the-shoulder camera, updated controls, and breathtaking visuals, this remake sets a new standard for horror games.

games.title: Resident Evil 7: Biohazard
games.description: A radical return to survival horror roots in first-person perspective. Investigate a derelict plantation in Louisiana in search of your missing wife, only to discover the Baker family has been infected by a terrifying mold-based virus. Claustrophobic corridors, limited resources, and visceral combat create an intensely personal horror experience. The game that reinvented the franchise for a new generation.
